title: podman-build --help: update description
body:
Update the description of podman-build which was mentioning the initial
requirement of Buildah which doesn't apply anymore since Podman is
vendoring Buildah code.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@suse.com>

comments.body:
LGTM
But you seem to have a gofmt error.

LGTM
Test issues appear to be a network flake, I'd kick the bot, but it's been ignoring me lately.
@TomSweeneyRedHat I force pushed to retrigger another run :)

:pushpin: Commit e78dc09 has been approved by `rhatdan`
